title: Woodfired Rhubarb Tarte with Mediterranean Twist
description: A sweet and tangy dessert that combines the flavors of the Mediterranean with the sweetness of woodfired rhubarb.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together yogurt, honey, thyme, and salt.
In a separate bowl, mix together almond flour and breadcrumbs.
Add sliced rhubarb to the yogurt mixture and toss to coat.
Roll out the almond flour mixture to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Place the dough in a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
Arrange the rhubarb mixture on top of the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with woodfired breadcrumbs.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the rhubarb is tender.
Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
